B0067HY1EQ.title: great deal!
B0067HY1EQ.text: These are great filters and especially for the price! I was looking for just one UV filter, and after stumbling upon this set which was not much more than the price of one filter, I bought it. These are great lenses. I especially like the polarizing filter, but all 3 are great. definitely a worthy buy!

B0067HY1EQ.title: Great set for the money
B0067HY1EQ.text: Set arrived BEFORE Amazon said it would! And it is peak Xmas shopping time now. Amazon is great. Only complaint is that two of the filters had finger prints on them . . . but at least that meant someone had done QC at Tiffen before shipping them out. Easy to clean. The case they come in is worth half the price. I store the retaining ring from my Canon S3 in the case when I have the extension tube on with the filter. The 812 warming filter is also great for overcast rainy days. For the price, you can't really do better. Oh, and the polarizer filter did work fine when I checked it against my computer monitor. Thanks to the person that suggested how to check it! Pictures of my Koi are now possible.

B0067HY1EQ.title: Just what I wanted!
B0067HY1EQ.text: They arrived quickly, and were precisely what I wanted. I would recommend this to anyone wanting the filters. Photographers shouldn't be without these.

B0067HY1EQ.title: Great Set of Lens Filters.
B0067HY1EQ.text: Great Set of Lens Filters. Purchased this for my photographer husband for Christmas. He uses them all the time and loves it. Highly recommend.

B0067HY1EQ.title: Decent filters
B0067HY1EQ.text: The UV and warm filters are good but, I don't see much of a difference with the circular polarizer. Yes I twisted it around while shooting the clouds/sky. It probably has an effect but I can't tell. Oh, also remember when using more than one filter, in wide shots (depending on the lens) the edges of the last filter comes into frame. Zooming in can help counter act this.

B0067HY1EQ.title: Very Pleased
B0067HY1EQ.text: I purchased these for a Nikon DSLR 55 - 300 Zoom lens. My first impressions of these filters are excellent.. The polorizer seems to work great on ocean reflections, and the warming filter works well for portriate photos as well.. I good value for the money..

B07BJ7ZZL7.title: Great!
B07BJ7ZZL7.text: Good quality, great colors, fast shipping! Fits my garmin Vivofit4 perfectly!

B07BJ7ZZL7.title: Love the different colors
B07BJ7ZZL7.text: Black one ripped after only a couple days.

B07BJ7ZZL7.title: Love the colors
B07BJ7ZZL7.text: I love that I have may color to choose from.

B07BJ7ZZL7.title: Not super flexible, but they are sturdy
B07BJ7ZZL7.text: So far these have held up and kept their color. I wish they were a tiny bit more flexible but they are comfortable and it works.

B07BJ7ZZL7.title: DONT BUY!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
B07BJ7ZZL7.text: Terrible product! Broke in 3 spots in just 5 days!

B07BJ7ZZL7.title: Broke in 2 days
B07BJ7ZZL7.text: Disappointed that the circle that holds the end of the band in place, broke within 2 days.

B004E2Z88O.title: Great product, great purchase, fast shipping! Thanks Amazon for making this happen!
B004E2Z88O.text: Great product, great purchase, fast shipping! My Droid is now prepared for everyday use, with this OEM essential pack. I shopped the internet, and once again Amazon had the best price. I recommend this. Thanks Amazon for making this happen!

B004E2Z88O.title: Great Deal!
B004E2Z88O.text: I had bought a Droid X2 Android phone from a Verizon store where afterwards they offered me this package for $100. I declined thinking I could find it cheaper elsewhere and I did. I was able to get it here for less then half the cost in the store. All wires are high quality, the car mount works wonders. I'm now able to charge at home, in the office or in the car. I haven't had a chance to use the HDMI out yet, but if it's near the quality of everything else in the package I have no worries.

B01N1TCT1Z.title: I like that it has a regular buckle instead of the ...
B01N1TCT1Z.text: it fits my fitbit alta well. I like that it has a regular buckle instead of the type that comes with the fitbit. But it has worn quickly and hasn't kept it's nice appearance for long. It's turned much darker, worn smooth and looks like I've had it for ages when it's only two months old.

B01N1TCT1Z.title: Mixed results
B01N1TCT1Z.text: The red band was excellent and as expected. The black band was wrong kind of band and did not work with Fitbit Alta. I had to return it.

B01N1TCT1Z.title: Love
B01N1TCT1Z.text: Love this and great with extender fit ankle wear

B01N1TCT1Z.title: Beautiful! Love it.
B01N1TCT1Z.text: Looks just like a watch band and makes it so much more elegant and works with Jewelry.

B01N1TCT1Z.title: Looks and feels like leather
B01N1TCT1Z.text: The band attached easily to my Fitbit Alta and looks like leather. I scratched the side of it but it still looks OK. Be careful with the band where it attaches to the unit. If you scratch it the leather buckles. Overall it is a good band for the price I paid.

B01N1TCT1Z.title: It is a good band
B01N1TCT1Z.text: The band is great. Perhaps I'm hard on them. They last about 6-9 months. But I like them

B008GYKN68.title: It works!
B008GYKN68.text: The charger and battery work very well. They arrived in a small package and on schedule. I charged my original battery and my new one the first day with no problems. I've taken many pictures since and I'm very happy so far.

B008GYKN68.title: Works Great
B008GYKN68.text: Excellent battery. Use them as backup batteries when out and about. Hold charge well and work as advertised.

B0B9JTJK7W.title: Good value, for what it is.
B0B9JTJK7W.text: This is a decent lightweight case for your iPad Pro, and it s a good value-for-your-buck. However, I wouldn t trust this to be your durable case , say for traveling, commuting, distracting the kids. I am concerned that a fall with this case may cause significant damage, especially as the case ages. I ve had the case for quite a few months now, and the first thing I can note is that the PVC screen cover is very loose, and needs to be carefully placed when closing it, so that it covers the screen completely. I am no longer able to use the folded screen cover for propping the tablet up anymore, because of the wear. On a happier note, the case *IS* easy to remove, so you can use a heavier and more protective case when you need to travel. This case adds almost no weight to the tablet as well. The colored part of the PVC hasn t scraped off or cracked either. So, as a light weight, safe-for-home case, it s a solid 4. As an all purpose case, I d rate it a 3 on it s own, or 3.5 if you re putting it into a computer backpack with a padded chamber for it.

B0B9JTJK7W.title: Feels secure
B0B9JTJK7W.text: The first feature that caught my attention is the clear back. The plastic feels sturdy yet also has a slight flexibility to it. The rose gold cover arrived with a very minute blemish, but I just love the classic look and the blemish is just too tiny to even bother. The design of the cover is great. I truly love that when I just fold it back against the back cover, everything remains even and flat with no additional bulk ones. The cover itself can be removed which is another unique feature. The holder for the pen sits flat on the cover rather than extending out from the side, this keeps everything more streamline and in line with my personal preference. So far , this is my new favorite! All my reviews are always voluntarily written.

B0B9JTJK7W.title: Second one I bought! Great value
B0B9JTJK7W.text: Great durable case for the money. Magnetic closing case, that will power off and on the iPad! Fits my 12.9 iPad Pro perfectly.

B0B9JTJK7W.title: My wife loves this case, BUT......
B0B9JTJK7W.text: My wife bought this last week and loves it. She says it's lightweight and does a good job of protecting her expensive iPad. Her only complaint is that the elastic band that holds the pencil is a completely different color of blue than the case. It's so far off that it it isn't a compliment to the cases color, it actually clashes with it. Too bad. I would have given the case 5 stars instead of 3. Update: The manufacturer or seller (I don't which one) sent me an email apologizing for my inconvenience and actually sent me a $5 credit. I think that that was a very nice gesture on their part and I certainly do appreciate the customer service. At least I know that they are reading these and care enough about their customers satisfaction to do something other than the usual "Oh, well" that we've all come to expect these days. As much as I appreciate their care and concern, that still doesn't change the fact that there is a major color difference between the elastic band and the case itself. I think that maybe instead of trying to get a color of the elastic close to the color of the case, why not just use a piece of black elastic on all color cases? The contrast would be a world of differe

B0B9JTJK7W.title: Pretty Good
B0B9JTJK7W.text: Likes: lightweight, snug fit, holes pretty much aligned , like material but I received it yesterday so not sure how it holds up over time Dislikes: had to really work to get pencil into holder because of the silicone cover on it although think it will stretch over time, know it wasn t designed for pencil with cover but if you have one like mine, know it s a struggle to get it in .... the bottom part is so thick that it s hard to press power button or to get to volume controls Doesn t have strong stand but I usually hold mine All in all it serves its purpose

B0B9JTJK7W.title: Best of both worlds!
B0B9JTJK7W.text: I was primarily looking for a clear case for my iPad, but didn't mind the option of a removable cover with loop for Apple Pen. The case is comfy and not too thick. However the clear silicone case isn't fully transparent as I planned to add stickers to the inside of the case. Will update when stickers and decals arrive.

B07M67FJDB.title: Luxurious to hold; protects the Kindle well
B07M67FJDB.text: I like the feel of this case. It covers the back entirely, and there is no reasonable chance of the Kindle falling out. The front cover folds all the way back without damage. It is light, though a bit thicker than some cases I've seen. I actually think the Kindle is getting too thin and I like the feel of something in my hand. The smaller cases are a bit insubstantial for my taste. This is plush, so it adds a bit of something to hold without adding weight as compared to the thinner ones. It seems reasonably sturdy, but I'm not letting my cats get their claws on it.

B07M67FJDB.title: Great case
B07M67FJDB.text: Perfect fit for my kindle and seems sturdy. I wish I could fold the cover behind but I found a way to prop the kindle and just turn the pages.

B07M67FJDB.title: Well Constructed
B07M67FJDB.text: It appears to be very sturdy without being heavy or bulky. The material for the cover itself is of very nice quality. I hadn't planned on carrying the Oasis with me, but the case has made me reconsider.

B07M67FJDB.title: A top of the line product requires a case like this. Feels so fine in the hand
B07M67FJDB.text: Completes my Oasis purchase. A top of the line product requires a case like this. Feels so fine in the hand, much better than without the case. Love it.

B07M67FJDB.title: Great Buy
B07M67FJDB.text: Protective cover that looks classic. Love it!

B07M67FJDB.title: Nice and convenient. Unfortunately, it doesn't include a place for the charger
B07M67FJDB.text: Nice and convenient. Unfortunately, it doesn't include a place for the charger (contrary to previous models)

B0C3VJHW5Z.title: Great concept poor design
B0C3VJHW5Z.text: The part that goes around the actual ipad ripped off of the folio after less than a week.

B0C3VJHW5Z.title: (((Got a refund!))
B0C3VJHW5Z.text: Tired of the Rose gold color. I sent this back because it is flimsy and not staying in my lap. Got the Fintie rotating case instead. I realized I did not need a keyboard. I use my Fintie sturdy case with a wireless mouse. Much better! Was a lot of money for this Boriquan flimsy case too. Thank God I for back my money.

B0C3VJHW5Z.title: Nice iPad mini cover and keyboard
B0C3VJHW5Z.text: While I don't use the cover with my iPad mini, I use the keypad. Cover added extra weight to my iPad I don't want at this time going to and from work. Color is pleasant and the price was amazingly affordable. The keyboard pairs up easily with iPad mini and holds charge for a long time.

B0C3VJHW5Z.title: Ipad mini keyboard and case
B0C3VJHW5Z.text: Easy to use. Provides good support and does not break easily as others.

B0C3VJHW5Z.title: the touch pad function doesn't work with it in the case
B0C3VJHW5Z.text: I use the touch pad fucntion to log in and my finger doesn't fit into the power button slot flat enough to activate this function. It otherwise is a nice case and keyboard

B0C3VJHW5Z.title: This is just okay
B0C3VJHW5Z.text: The case is okay sturdy, but has gotten floppier with use. The keyboard is functional. Bright back light is good. Colors are cool. Nothing terrible. But just okay. Tiny keys on keyboard mean fat fingers need not buy this item. :)

B06XKRXLDR.title: She like the immediate open screen when you lift the cover
B06XKRXLDR.text: Bought it for my wife because our old leather one was giving out. She like the immediate open screen when you lift the cover.

B06XKRXLDR.title: Great case for my iPad 2!!
B06XKRXLDR.text: Fits better than I expected. This is a very nice case for my iPad 2. Great seller with fast shipping!!

B06XKRXLDR.title: Good
B06XKRXLDR.text: Protects my ipad from scratches and what not. Serves its function. A little overpriced at around 20 dollars but what isn't these days?

B06XKRXLDR.title: Case didn t fit my iPad even though description said it would
B06XKRXLDR.text: Nothing wrong with the case itself. Only issue is that it did not fit my iPad. I ve ordered this exact product before and they shipped the correct case previously. Unfortunately not this time around

B06XKRXLDR.title: Excellent Case
B06XKRXLDR.text: Excellent case. This is the second one we've bought. Slim and lightweight.

B06XKRXLDR.title: Great product!
B06XKRXLDR.text: Great product!!! I love the color and it works great on my IPad 2 with retinal display. I'm very pleased!

B0BSQL7M51.title: Fast, reliable, and highly recommended
B0BSQL7M51.text: This little card doesn't sacrifice performance for size. It handles 4k GoPro content and Android adoptable storage in my ShieldTV equally well. For now it'll stay in the Shield, but you should be able to use it in a camera, phone, or anything else at breakneck speed. I've used 8 differed 128+ gb PNY SD (full sized SD) cards in my Nikons, Fujis, and iPod Classics (via zif to SD adapters), and none have ever had even a slight hiccup. I cannot recommend this enough.

B0BSQL7M51.title: Excellent for capturing video on my smartphone.
B0BSQL7M51.text: I installed this on an LG V20 smartphone in order to derive the maximum benefit from this phone s video capabilities. So far, I am very pleased with my admittedly light testing. No stutters. No dropped frames. I have not run any disk speed tests because I don t think they are relevant in this kind of environment. The best test is to use it and analyze the video results. I have a lot of PNY Flash media devices and none have left me down nd I doubt this will be the exception, though you can never know for sure. PNY is a brand I recommend as an excellent value. Jerry

B0BSQL7M51.title: Works great for dash cams.
B0BSQL7M51.text: I bought the Vantru dash cam that didn't come with a memory card. I had to buy that separately and went with this one. Works great with it.

B0BSQL7M51.title: Good for price, storage may not high speed photo worthy
B0BSQL7M51.text: Nice data storage for the money. Read speed about 100mb/s. Write speed givers around 60mb/s.

B0BSQL7M51.title: Works great in GoPro
B0BSQL7M51.text: I purchased this to use in my GoPro 9 and it works great, no slowdowns or drive issues. I have been using this for months and continue to get great video. Good price for a great value.

B0BSQL7M51.title: Good for drone usage
B0BSQL7M51.text: good transfer speeds for my DJI Mini. Not sure of the transfer rates for the 4k when I m recording but there are no signs of any lag or long periods of time before being able to record another run. Flew in the rain a few times and no issues with the card getting wait so far.

B00AZOIG9I.title: Five Stars
B00AZOIG9I.text: Great replacement charger and I love that it comes with two extra batteries! Bonus!

B00AZOIG9I.title: Great charger! Charges fast. Definately a good buy!
B00AZOIG9I.text: Great charger. Excellent price. Charges fast and batteries seem to last. It's always good to have several back up batteries.

B00AZOIG9I.title: Good buy!
B00AZOIG9I.text: Charger works well and the batteries hold a decent charge. Good buy!

B00AZOIG9I.title: Everything arrived as expected.
B00AZOIG9I.text: The most amazing thing about this deal, is the price.....For what 1 battery alone cost at a local retailer, Big Mike's gives you 2 batteries, plus the charger for less than 1 battery costs at one of our big battery stores, and even they have to order it and you have to wait for it to be shipped in.....I will probably be ordering more batteries from Big Mike's in the near future....Would highly recommend.

B00AZOIG9I.title: A must have
B00AZOIG9I.text: This is a must to have you don't need to depend on charging with your camera. The two extra batteries mean you don't have to worry about running out of power with your camera.

B00AZOIG9I.title: ... got a Fujifilm S1 camera for Christmas (which is awesome, I might add)
B00AZOIG9I.text: I got a Fujifilm S1 camera for Christmas (which is awesome, I might add), and I wanted to buy a car charger and some extra batteries. This charger/battery set fit the bill. The charger charges the batteries really quickly and works well. So far, very pleased.

B01MZA1AB2.title: As expected
B01MZA1AB2.text: Works like it s supposed to work. Much cheaper than buying from Lenovo.

B01MZA1AB2.title: Great replacement for 7265 in ASUS Zenbook.
B01MZA1AB2.text: Use this to replace a broken 7265 card in an ASUS-UX305FA notebook. Was super easy to swap and works like a champ.

B01MZA1AB2.title: So much better than the XPS13 Stock card
B01MZA1AB2.text: This is day 1 with the new wireless card and it is immediately noticeable. From the exact same location in my house I can see iperf tests go from 30Mb/s to120Mb/s while connected to the same access point on the same band in my house. In addition to performance there are more advanced configuration options for band preference, TX power, etc. than the stock chipset.

B01MZA1AB2.title: Great upgrade for a Dell XPS 15 9560!
B01MZA1AB2.text: This worked well as an upgrade for the crappy Killer wireless card in my Dell XPS 15 9560. There's been a few reviews talking about the wiring and possibly having to reverse from the Killer wireless card. My tip - just look at the old card you are taking out - there's a plus and minus sign on it. There's also a plus and minus sign on the Intel 8265. Just make sure the plus comes off the old card and goes on to the new card the same way, and you are fine. In my case at least I didn't even have to install new drivers for this card - it worked out of the box.

B01MZA1AB2.title: State of the art wireless card...
B01MZA1AB2.text: Perfect operation. WiFi and Bluetooth work without any interruption. Must buy for the price.

B01MZA1AB2.title: Fixed my WiFi problems with my Lenovo!
B01MZA1AB2.text: Fixed my WiFi problems with my Lenovo Ideapad 530S! Found a Google hit on Lenovo headaches with intermittent problem with WiFi connections - this particular WiFi card was recommended. There is also Google search hits that talk about whitelist problems and possible BIOS compatibility. I had NONE of those! Pop open the bottom. Remove old WiFi card. Install this new WiFi card. Redo any WiFi and Bluetooth connections - that's it; no messing with BIOS, no weird Windows pop-up error messages. The computer didn't even know there was new hardware installed - zero problems with drivers. Your only hint is that all your old WiFi and Bluetooth connections are all reset and gone. Be careful with the antenna wire connections as they pull straight up from the board - these wires are very thin. Longest part was finding a T4 Torx driver to remove all the screws on the bottom panel; lucky I had a set that I used on taking apart cell phones. For ~$30 to fix my WiFi headaches is a great value!

B07G5TWZXK.title: Sharp Center, Right Edge Softness
B07G5TWZXK.text: This is an attractive lightweight lens that seems an irresistible bargain. It arrived well packed, and comes with a zippered case that is one of the more useful lens cases I ve ever seen. Autofocus is fast, quiet, and accurate on my A7R IV. Color rendition is beautiful, if a bit different than Sony lenses, with slightly higher contrast. Center sharpness is outstanding. My copy, however, exhibits right side softness even when stopped down in good light, indicating mild - though annoying - de-centering. Not sure if I will be keeping the lens because of this.

B07G5TWZXK.title: Amazing for the price and weight
B07G5TWZXK.text: I've resisted taking a camera on hiking/backpacking trips; but finally caved after the A7ii came down in price. That paired with the Samyang 24mm makes for a lightweight, super-versatile, all-around lens. Only been using it a couple of weeks and couldn't be happier thus far!

B07G5TWZXK.title: Gem for street photography
B07G5TWZXK.text: Sharp and nice lens. Flawless lightweight design.. the only lens you would need for street photography!

B0822SL7JX.title: Great fit for New Mac Pro 16"
B0822SL7JX.text: Item received quickly everything was included; Screen saver and keyboard cover/protector.

B0822SL7JX.title: The cutest MacBook case!
B0822SL7JX.text: You get compliments on this case all the time. It is the cutest! I ve had it for the past three years and it only has a few dings and cracks. Durable for the most part, unless you re like me and are always dropping your MacBook. I d buy again!

B0822SL7JX.title: Be careful if you use adapters
B0822SL7JX.text: I like the case, but what I wish I had known when buying it was that I would only be able to use the top part and the keyboard cover - the bottom cover will not allow me to use the adapter that must fit snugly along beside a long portion of the side of my Mac. (thanks [not] Apple for the dongle hell design!) So, it's mostly a complaint against Apple, but anyone buying this case (or probably any case like it) should be aware of this limitation.

B0822SL7JX.title: Sturdy, durable and fun pattern.
B0822SL7JX.text: I purchased a clear cover from some other brand. Since it cracked and broke at the corner I purchased this one as a replacement. The material is strong and sturdy. The pattern is fun. This will last.

B0822SL7JX.title: Super cute and functional
B0822SL7JX.text: I love this set! It fits my 16" macbook pro perfectly and while I wasn't sure if I'd use the keyboard cover as well, I actually really like it. Both the hard cover and the keyboard cover are easy to install and use and I haven't had any issues.

B0822SL7JX.title: Bottom part comes off loose all the time
B0822SL7JX.text: Top holds great yet the bottom doesn't grip, it comes off constantly

B0993H9FLR.title: Would NOT recommend
B0993H9FLR.text: This case makes it had to find the volume and power button due to the placement of the handle. For tgis tablet model, the handle should ve on the other side. Also made it hard to plug the charger in. In turn I broke the charger port.

B0993H9FLR.title: YESSSSSS!!!!!!
B0993H9FLR.text: My little big man is a tough one but, so far he has not been able to damage the tablet

B0993H9FLR.title: Everyone Should Get One
B0993H9FLR.text: Hola! It's perfect for my Alcatel Joy Tab-2. It secures your tablet. I purchased straps for it and carry it like a small briefcase. I don't have to worry about slip and break. Worth the purchase! Gracias!

B0993H9FLR.title: Best case for kids
B0993H9FLR.text: This case is exactly how all phone cases should be made. Hint hint. My daughter loves the stand feature the most. I like the rubber grip for my children's hands along with the bar. It prevents more drops and it's rubber gives a little bounce when it is dropped but the tablet is completely protected at all times on all sides. The volume and on and off keys are a bit difficult to get to for an adult however it seems to be fine for the little hands. I have 2 of these and will continue to purchase. One thing I will say that I'm not crazy about is the green one showing so much dirt and not wiping clean. It's stained, but it's not a make or break for me but keep that in mind when choosing colors. The pink is pretty and doesn't show as much grime.

B0993H9FLR.title: Charger port went out
B0993H9FLR.text: Charger port went out my tablet didn't last two months Charger stop working waste of money

B0993H9FLR.title: Brought for toddlers
B0993H9FLR.text: Purchased for a 1 & 2 yes old really destcrive babies by tablet has been protected well will buy 2 more for big kids lol

B07T9GCD14.title: Brilliant Sound from Small Blue Tooth "Beach" Speaker
B07T9GCD14.text: I was very surprised and pleased with the sound quality of a small speaker built for outdoor/ beach use. The blue tooth connectivity is excellent, and battery life is quite good for a day at the beach.

B07T9GCD14.title: Good speaker for the price
B07T9GCD14.text: I love this speaker so much, I bought one for my son

B07T9GCD14.title: Marvelous
B07T9GCD14.text: For the price it is a really good deal. It is not too loud and that is okay but the quality of the sound is very good I am grateful I made that decision to buy this

B07T9GCD14.title: As advertised
B07T9GCD14.text: Good sound for such a little speaker. Super portable and the built in carabiner clip is great. Battery life is good as well.

B07T9GCD14.title: Not built to last
B07T9GCD14.text: I ve bought two of these within the last 3 years. The first one simply stopped accepting a charge. Assuming this was a fluke, I bought another not less than a year later that one has also stopped charging. Unless you purchase this with the understanding it is disposable and will likely only last you about a year, it s not worth it.

B07T9GCD14.title: So good, this is my 3rd one!
B07T9GCD14.text: I have 3 of these around the house and garage and patio. Simple to operate, easy bluetooth connection and quality sound for such a small and inexpensive speaker. Love it.

B000AQ8OFC.title: Sounds great, woke up my old Peavey.
B000AQ8OFC.text: Didn't realize how much dead my old midrangers were on my DJ speakers until I tried to tweak them with an equalizer. These little babes woke up the Peaveys and gave the voice back to the vocalists. Hard to go wrong for the price, and the look isn't too shabby either.

B000AQ8OFC.title: Power Acoustik XPS-104 4" Midrange 300W Speaker
B000AQ8OFC.text: I purchased 4 of these Midrange speakers in June 2013 and installed them in my van. I have a pioneer head unit running these speakers and they are great. I do not know what a few people are saying that they are crap but I disagree. These speakers put out good midrange sound, even very good midrange bass as well and doing it off a un-amped head unit. These speakers are priced very well for the quality and I can't knock them. If you buy them and use them for what they are desinged for then you will be happy. I plan on getting 4 more for my car. 3/28/2017 Update: Well I got 4 more of these Power Acoustik XPS-104 midrange speakers and put them in my 2015 Honda Fit doors to add a little extra to my 6.5" speakers already in the door. What can I say $50.00 bucks and extra midrange sound add to all 4 doors - nice.

B00A493CNY.title: Works great for older 30" Apple Cinema Display
B00A493CNY.text: I bought this to use with 30 inch Apple Cinema display. It works great at full 2560x1920 resolution

B00A493CNY.title: Works but does not satisfy DRM Protection
B00A493CNY.text: This works great to get your old monitor working that requires HDMI from 144 Hz framerates but it does not satisfy the streaming DRM protection so still allows your movies to stream with a full static screen every time you play them. For Gaming and normal PC work, you can use your monitor but watching movies is no longer an option when using this.

B00A493CNY.title: Finally, something that works
B00A493CNY.text: This might not be relevant anymore as most monitors have more than one connection type BUT if your monitor only has a DVI DUAL LINK port, this thing will work (note the DUAL LINK part). Tested on a DELL 3007WFPHC with AMD and NVIDIA cards and functions as expected @ 2560x1600 (DVI Dual Link cable is needed). Spend the $ if the monitor is worth the effort as most other cheaper solutions might be a waste of your money.

B00A493CNY.title: 2560x1600 dual link? Yup! It works
B00A493CNY.text: With the pandemic and working at home full time, I wanted to use my old 30" Dell 3007WFPHC at full 2560x1600 resolution with a modern Dell laptop docking station. This is the only solution that works for me. No HDMI or DP to DVI-D "dual link" cable worked. After a little research, cables alone would never work. To save a 3.0 USB port for power, I used a dedicated USB power hub. It's like magic out of this little black box, 2560x1600 @60 Hz in all it's full glory.

B00A493CNY.title: Works very well in 2560x1600 resolution
B00A493CNY.text: Yepp, plugged in this adapter and immediately I had the full resolution of the monitor supported. I needed the conversion to dual link DVI because I have a dual link DVI KVM and the newest addition to my stable only has a DisplayPort output. I have had this in use with the KVM for more than a month now; no issues whatsoever.

B00A493CNY.title: Supports 144hz for DVI-D 144hz Monitors
B00A493CNY.text: Bought this product for my 1080 TI FE card to work with my DVI-D 144hz monitor. Since the adapted the 1080 TI FE comes with does not support anything more than 60hz I had to buy this pricey adapter to get my 144hz and it works wonders. Got it in the mail and it is just plug and play and I was using 144hz right away and what a difference it makes!

B07XHT7GM4.title: Disappointed with these things
B07XHT7GM4.text: these did not work for the ibuds i ordered. first pair didn't fit(no instructions on how to properly put them on. Contacted customer service & received another pair. nope didn't work either. Aren't all ibuds the same??

B07C4YHF4L.title: Don't fully like
B07C4YHF4L.text: Never used the originals as I received this used in my workspace, but none of the sizes fits and the headset is always too lose

B07C4YHF4L.title: Good replacement
B07C4YHF4L.text: Great replacement ear buds for my headset. I love my headset and these feel just like the original ones that came with it .

B00SK8LK1W.title: Five Stars
B00SK8LK1W.text: These work very well.... All Hail Lady Ada......

B00SK8LK1W.title: Worked great on my Windows 10 computer.
B00SK8LK1W.text: Worked great on my Windows 10 computer and Win XP. I have used it for flashing ESP-12S and Huzzah wifi modules without any problem.

B00SK8LK1W.title: Works perfect and I love the bling
B00SK8LK1W.text: Works perfect and I love the bling! I was able to use FT_Prog to program the cable to work with Curtis electric motor controllers. Genuine FTDI chip.

B00JYFN9YG.title: Glass filter produces same results as more expensive filters
B00JYFN9YG.text: I decided to test the ICE 10-stop filter against other filters that were 3 times the price. I expected to witness a noticeable drop in quality based on the price, but there was none. This glass filter has uniform density throughout and produces very suitable long exposures. There is a slight color tint when using the filter (which even the more expensive filters suffer from), but nothing that cannot be corrected in post-production. The filter lacks a foam seal like the Lee Big Stopper, but dozens of test shots during a recent trip to Iceland yielded no light leaks. For those exploring the world of long exposure photography, this filter is a great budget option.

B00JYFN9YG.title: and I would recommend getting an app for your phone or tablet to ...
B00JYFN9YG.text: This takes a little getting used to, and I would recommend getting an app for your phone or tablet to help calculate correct exposures, but you can get some great effects using his filter. I did quite a bit of research before deciding on this one vs the cokin or Lee, and I don't regret my purchase. There is a very slight magenta tone, but it's easy to edit out since the filter covers the whole frame. I included a couple shots I took in Hawaii on Maui and Kauai (glass beach). These were the first couple of shots I used the filter for, so it's not my best work, but I really like the effect this gives. Make sure you have a very solid tripod (and maybe even a remote) or this filter isn't going to work for you.

B00JYFN9YG.title: and I would recommend getting an app for your phone or tablet to ...
B00JYFN9YG.text: This takes a little getting used to, and I would recommend getting an app for your phone or tablet to help calculate correct exposures, but you can get some great effects using his filter. I did quite a bit of research before deciding on this one vs the cokin or Lee, and I don't regret my purchase. There is a very slight magenta tone, but it's easy to edit out since the filter covers the whole frame. I included a couple shots I took in Hawaii on Maui and Kauai (glass beach). These were the first couple of shots I used the filter for, so it's not my best work, but I really like the effect this gives. Make sure you have a very solid tripod (and maybe even a remote) or this filter isn't going to work for you.

B00JYFN9YG.title: Uniform density, worked as expected in casual use.
B00JYFN9YG.text: Since I am starting out with filters I set up a test scene in my house at night where I could control the lighting and get a feel for how the filter worked. After a couple of dozen test pictures I was pretty happy with the filter and my ability to use it. I did find it is slightly under 10 stops but still pretty close. The density is uniform and since I shoot raw and use a white balance card any tint is unimportant. Have used it in the field for cloud blurring and at traffic lights for some interesting motion photos. Also used it to remove traffic and people on a street scene. Don't see any artifacts in any photos yet, I know this is not a high end glass filter with exotic coatings and perfectly polished surfaces so I don't expect perfection. Still I don't see any problems with this filter, right now my skill level is the limiting factor. It wouldn't have hurt to include a laminated exposure conversion card with the filter but I found several good free apps for that.

B00JYFN9YG.title: ... this at waterfall and thought it would be a great to use this but very disappointed
B00JYFN9YG.text: First time I used this at waterfall and thought it would be a great to use this but very disappointed. It produces hazy images and results were really gone down a big time. I used this on 24-70 Canon 2.8 ii on 5D Mark 4. I would have to look for other options.

B00JYFN9YG.title: works great
B00JYFN9YG.text: I did not notice any color variations except towards a slight tint of blue than can be easily corrected with a shift in white balance camera settings or with photo editing software/Affinity Photo. also very little or no Vignette at all. the first Image that shows two single mast sail boats are with out Vignette with a 10 sec. exposure. I also use the glass with the ICE 1000 logo facing forward/looking at source and I have also tested rotating the glass vertical or horizontal no change In Image quality. Nothing wrong with this Glass all good.

B08JYXM5XD.title: Right how I expected
B08JYXM5XD.text: Great colors and materials, take care about make nobs or pull because the color is degraded like other silicone products

B08JYXM5XD.title: Protect your devices!
B08JYXM5XD.text: You get a lot for your buck! Great & durable.

B08JYXM5XD.title: now hear this
B08JYXM5XD.text: container is worth the price but all the extra stuff is a waste as not very usable as all cannot be used together, however, the neck rope is nice addition. Super price

B08JYXM5XD.title: Liked the product
B08JYXM5XD.text: Item was delivered in a timely manner and as it was shown.

B08JYXM5XD.title: The pictures look cool but the actual products don't look like the pics
B08JYXM5XD.text: First, the red silicone does not look like the photos. Both the red and black products are matte finished and lint sticks to them like crazy. The neck strap for the airpods pretty much just pulls them out of my ears. I would not buy these again.

B08JYXM5XD.title: Durability
B08JYXM5XD.text: I m excited to see how long they can withstand normal everyday wearing. I love the colors and the price is pretty reasonable!

B003XT6OTG.title: it is very sturdy and portable in a check-in bag without damage from ...
B003XT6OTG.text: It works exactly as described...unfortunately it works too well. I used this for my home and was the sole user, so I registered 8 fingertips. I also set the password. But should you forget your password and you didn't set your biometric print, LaCie customer support will be unable to help you. The most they can do is do a data swipe of your data and reset it to factory setting to allow you to reset your password. Besides this issue, it is very sturdy and portable in a check-in bag without damage from shock. I chose to carry only one cable, since you can power the drive and transfer data with the same cable. It's also very light weight. I didn't give it five stars because I believe the password length is limited but doesn't necessarily notify you as you type that you've entered in the maximum number of characters. So be mindful as you type your password if your passwords tend to be on the lengthy side.

B093GWXVC4.title: Fits perfectly
B093GWXVC4.text: It fits perfectly and the image is adorable

B093GWXVC4.title: Works fine
B093GWXVC4.text: It is sturdy. I like the way it shuts the kindle down by closing it. The one thing I would suggest is a diagram showing how to set it at an angle to watch videos. Took me a while to figure it out.

B093GWXVC4.title: What a nice case and is well worth the money.
B093GWXVC4.text: This case is so pretty. My fire 8 fits in it perfectly. My fire tablet is so easy to hold and read. I love this case.

B093GWXVC4.title: Everything I want in a cover for my kindle.
B093GWXVC4.text: I like the appearance, surface feel, inside padding, flexibility and ease of positioning and the closing tab.

B093GWXVC4.title: Measure before you purchase
B093GWXVC4.text: This is the second time purchasing a cover for my tablet. Both time the product has been approximately 1/2 inch short. First time, shame on me. Second time, I checked MT tablet for the name and model. This one should have worked but it is also 1/2 inch short. Now I have to go through the gruesome take of returning. UGH!

B093GWXVC4.title: That the product received is exactly as the description in the add.
B093GWXVC4.text: The cover did not fit my kindle even though the description indicated that it would fit.

B094C5ZN1M.title: 33% defective
B094C5ZN1M.text: 35 of the 105 switches were dead or malfunctioning.

B08K2T4JFQ.title: LOVE it
B08K2T4JFQ.text: this has great sound quality and def worth every penny! I love that it has the bass speakers and my kids like to watch it move around with the sound waves! very loud even with just one, its awesome for a pool party or a garage!

B08K2T4JFQ.title: Stopped working two weeks after I bought it ( replacement on the way)
B08K2T4JFQ.text: It was great in the beginning! Loud and great for a personal concert. One day I used it till it drained out of battery, thought I would charge it when I get back from work but it would not turn back on. Tried different stuff to turn it back on, nothing worked. Waiting on the replacement.

B08K2T4JFQ.title: Awesome!!
B08K2T4JFQ.text: I just broke it in with heavy bass music and it sounds so crisp and clear and is very loud even at 50%. Buy it, it s SO worth the money.

B08K2T4JFQ.title: So glad I bought this!***coming back to edit****
B08K2T4JFQ.text: Charges fast and battery lasts a long time. Sound is amazing. I just love it! *****submitted wonderful review but it has been less than 6 months and now the speaker will not hold a charge. There was only a 90 day warranty. That s convenient. I do not recommend buying a refurbished anything from this seller.

B08K2T4JFQ.title: Great speaker
B08K2T4JFQ.text: Great bass at 50% volume, and the high and mids are good. I got sent the wrong color, I emailed the seller about it and they asked me am I sure its a different color and I sent pictures no response after a few days....so Im going to return it.

B07MVKYVVL.title: Ear piece hook
B07MVKYVVL.text: Comfort is relative to the design itself and not necessarily due to product. Durability is also related to how you handle placing the ear piece on. It s very stiff and allows very little flexibility so subject to snap in pieces. As for the value it s right on the money. Especially since I was unable to find a replacement locally (Romania). Despite the additional cost of shipping it was still better than buying a new Jabara headset. Also it arrived earlier than expected which was greatly appreciated.

B07MVKYVVL.title: Comfortable
B07MVKYVVL.text: Just what I expected. Comfortable they stay in place

B07MVKYVVL.title: I only need the smaller size. Cause I know I will bring buying this item again. Thank,you.
B07MVKYVVL.text: Some of them fix around the ear pice and some of didn t. And they break to easy. Other that it s fix perfect. Only small fix around the ear pice.

B07MVKYVVL.title: Not durable
B07MVKYVVL.text: I like the way they fit and go over the ear. Two of them broke at the connection in the same day.

B01DLNTUYY.title: What a bugger to install but works great. Not one problem with installation as long as ...
B01DLNTUYY.text: What a bugger to install but works great. Not one problem with installation as long as there's a service manual but really need to pay attention. Screen works great.

B01DLNTUYY.title: HP TouchSmart 15-AC 15
B01DLNTUYY.text: Screen worked just like the new. Came well packaged

B00XHY9YTE.title: Great product, had to contact customer support to install ...
B00XHY9YTE.text: Great product, had to contact customer support to install because of an OnStar issue, but otherwise, install not too hard and works.

B00XHY9YTE.title: works great
B00XHY9YTE.text: Was able to install Aftermarket on my 2006 HHR. Hint. if you have amplified system, use this one, otherwise GMOS-LAN=03 should work.

B07Y8T5GTV.title: Superior band
B07Y8T5GTV.text: Great quality band. The snaps hold it firmly in place.

B07Y8T5GTV.title: way to hard to use
B07Y8T5GTV.text: wonder colors, but that's it! Way to HARD to fasten by yourself. I tried to help someone put on on and I about broke me fingers trying to push them together. Don't waste your money on this type of band. I have a hole set wasting away now.

B07Y8T5GTV.title: Cool Bands
B07Y8T5GTV.text: I love these bands. Great replacement or just a change of color to match an outfit :-)

B0BKSXPZ82.title: The best thing I didn t know I needed
B0BKSXPZ82.text: My friend had this cover for her remote and I thought wow that s different. It is the best purchase I didn t know I needed. They are available in glow in the dark and non-glowing. It helps protect the life the the remote, doesn t slide off the side of the chair and oddly makes me happy!

B01AC7CC24.title: Easy to install on the stereo to mount in the ...
B01AC7CC24.text: This fit my 2001 Chevy Tahoe perfectly. Easy to install on the stereo to mount in the dash. Wiring harness matched up great and the package had the wire colors and their purpose listed on the outside. Had it spliced to the stereo harness in a matter of minutes. Antenna adapter was a perfect fit and so far has produced great signal even on the AM stations unlike my previous Tahoe.

B093N94GPG.title: A nice gift!
B093N94GPG.text: For the right person, this item makes a very nice gift! I shipped it to her. She seems pleased and satisfied, so... Mission Accomplished!

B00K0LAPDQ.title: Cheap Beats!
B00K0LAPDQ.text: This item, 2 subs and Dual Ported box shipped for FREE!! That is an incredible deal in and of itself!! Now for the product. The box, its your standard prefab box. You get what you pay for, so new exactly what I was getting and was in no way disappointed. The subs, yes, they are Pyle, already a "low end" sub, but for the price you pay, these subs are surprisingly decent! Your not going to be competitive in a sound competition with these, but that's not why I bought them. They add a good amount of low end for a very reasonable price. If you want a "better" sub, then buy one that's more expensive. Again, you get what you pay for. And I am very happy with these and the FREE shipping. Enjoy!

B00K0LAPDQ.title: Five Stars
B00K0LAPDQ.text: Great subs for the price , they sound a lot better than people would think

B00K0LAPDQ.title: Low quality speakers.
B00K0LAPDQ.text: The speakers suck. Mine blew in less than a week. The box is huuuge and good quality. That's the only reason this is a deal. If your trunk isn't really big this is not the box for you. I don't know the dimensions but it barely fits in my jaguar xf trunk.

B07QF5117Q.title: I am using this on a LINUX box not for gaming
B07QF5117Q.text: Works great I wanted a dport ot dport no adapters and this card provides it. Plug and Work for Linux.

B07GXM524L.title: Can't use camera without removing it from case
B07GXM524L.text: The case is cute and holds the tablet well; however, in order to use the camera feature it has to be removed from the case.

B07Y6K1PRB.title: Perfect little gift
B07Y6K1PRB.text: I got this for my partner. They are a film marker so I thought it was a cute little random gift. They love it! And it's useful for their job too.

B08862M8VY.title: Awesome will buy again
B08862M8VY.text: Just as described in the picture. Beautiful very good product and I loved it
